title: Sqrilizz Optimization
description: [1.16.5-1.21.11] Sqrilizz Optimizatsion is optimized Minecraft builds focused on performance and stability. Perfect for low-end PCs and smoother gameplay on any system.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5695dc3e5767a92fa1fe7342cf8a0ee039a9ad0e_0.webp) --- ## ⚡ Sqrilizz Optimization – Lightweight & Powerful FPS Boost Pack **Sqrilizz Optimization** is a lightweight and performance-focused modpack for **Fabric**, **Forge**, **Quilt**, and **NeoForge**, designed to **dramatically boost FPS**, **reduce lag**, and **minimize system load** – all while keeping full compatibility with other mods and multiplayer servers. Perfect for **low-end PCs**, but powerful enough for advanced users too. --- ### Right now follow me on [telegram](https://t.me/Matve1mok1) for news and if you have issues
🛠️ Supported Minecraft Versions & Loaders * **Minecraft:** `1.16.5` → `1.21.8!` * **Supported Modloaders:** * 🧵 Fabric * 🔨 Forge * 🧶 Quilt * 💠 NeoForge *(Version support may vary)*
---
🚀 Key Features * 🔼 Massive **FPS boost** (2–3x compared to vanilla) * 🧊 **Reduced stuttering** and **chunk loading lag** * 🧠 Optimized **memory usage** and **lower CPU/GPU load** * 🧩 Fully **compatible with servers and other mods** * ⚙️ Tweaked for both performance and **gameplay stability**
---
📦 Included Optimization Mods ### 🔧 Core Mods: * [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) *(or OptiFine for Forge versions)* * [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) * [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) * [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) * **NEW!** [VulkanMod]([https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)) ### 🧪 Additional Tweaks: * [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) * [MemoryLeakFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) * Version-specific tweaks for **maximum performance**
---
💡 Who Is This For? * 💻 Players with **low-end** or **older PCs** * ⚙️ Modded players needing **better performance** * 🌐 Server owners looking for a **lag-free experience** * 🎮 Anyone who wants smoother Minecraft gameplay – no matter the setup
---
🔒 Bonus: Secure Gaming with VPN Looking for a fast and private VPN? Check out **[Candelix VPN](https://candelix.net)** — high-speed, secure, and optimized for gaming! **Available locations:** Estonia, Finland, Russia, Germany, USA
---
